title: Harry Potter Music Resource Pack
description: This is a Harry Potter resource pack that changes all the discs to have Harry Potter music and textures!
body:
This pack has been made by the creators of the Youtube channels The Blockbuster Bros, and Foster's Creations.

Music used:
John Williams - A Window to the Past,
 John Williams - The Face of Voldemort,
 Patrick Doyle - Harry in Winter,
 John Williams - Leaving Hogwarts,
 Patrick Doyle - Hogwarts March,
 John Williams - Mischef Managed,
 John Williams - Lumos!,
 John Williams - Hedwig's Theme,
 Nicholas Hooper - Fireworks,
 Youtube - Hedwig's Theme (DJ AG Remix),
 John Williams - Fawkes the Phoenix,
 Nicholas Hooper - Dumbledore's Army,
 John Williams - Harry's Wondrous World,
 Nicholas Hooper - Professor Umbridge,
 Nicholas Hooper - The Room of Requirement,
 John Williams - The Chamber of Secrets,
 John Williams - Diagon Alley,
 John Williams - Nimbus 2000,
 Nicholas Hooper - Harry and Hermione,
 John Williams - Buckbeak's Flight,
 Nicholas Hooper - The Knight Bus,

 If you want the music discs not cut off, download our data pack here: https://modrinth.com/datapack/harry-potter-music-data-pack
